creator: flz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you give more information?  I'd like to have a look at Xorg.0.log 
when moused is started by devd and manually.  In the meantime, I think 
you can set this in /etc/rc.conf, I reckon Xorg will autodetect the USB 
mouse: 

moused_nondefault_enable="NO"
